title: Potassium 'n' Sulphur Gunpowder (PSG)
description: vanilla friendly Crafting and new uses for Gunpowder. and some further stuffs
body: This mod (Forge only yet) adds Potassium and Sulphur Ores, which allow you (somewhat realistically) to craft Gunpowder;   which you can normally only get by slayng Creepers (that over time it gonna starts to get boring).   Unlike the other mods which add similar contents. the manifesto of this mod is to avoid items which exist only for one purpose, becoming useless in advanced game. each item has one ore more purpouses beside gunpowder ![](https://i.imgur.com/Xso9x9b.jpg)  ![](https://i.imgur.com/sFxuLjY.png) [![](https://i.imgur.com/nA5eh0n.png)](https://mcreator.net/modification/83614/potassium-sulfurs-gunpowder)       \[Tap on the button above for the MCreator page\]   **Note: the main version is the 1.20.1**    **( the others may be outdated )**   ![](https://i.imgur.com/RgAzl4W.png)   generation heights sulphur y9 to y75 \ deepslate sulphur y-54 to y-7 \ nether sulphur y20 to y102 \ potassium y9 to y104 ****Few details:**** Potassium ore only generates in the Overworld, while the Sulphur ore spawns both in the Overworld (in deepslate too) and the Nether. ores photo are here: deepslate sulphur  ![](https://i.imgur.com/KjyvyCc.jpg) potassium ore  ![](https://i.imgur.com/qtQERlW.png) craftings  ![](https://i.imgur.com/YAEgojM.jpg) In order to craft Gunpowder, first you need to craft the Saltpetre by mixing Potassium, Rotten Flesh, and Bone Meal.  ![](https://i.imgur.com/XFm80EB.jpg) ![](https://i.imgur.com/IrjNnym.png)  ![](https://i.imgur.com/OeEhCM4.png) if you have any gunpowder in excess, you may use it to make amazing throwable Explosive Bundles (name suggestions are appreciated). ![](https://i.imgur.com/ZgzKpSH.png) Farmer's Delight compatibility ![](https://i.imgur.com/x2vS7kn.jpeg) NOTE: if  you don't like this feature, disable it trough this Datapack : [https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/explosive-bundle-remover-for-potassium-amp-sulfur-s-gunpowder-official/](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/explosive-bundle-remover-for-potassium-amp-sulfur-s-gunpowder-official/) Minecraft Data Pack (planetminecraft.com)   Potassium Blocks need to be handeled carefully nearby water or might react violently ![](https://i.imgur.com/VcoHWk2.jpg) wax them like Copper to prevent any harmful behaviour (or disable the reaction via doPotassiumBlocksExplode gamerule) **Blue Vitriol** is a new shiny addition the the mod use it to Clean up mossy blocks, grass, mycelium, and infested stones or to speed up copper oxidation (it can also be turned to blue Dye) ![](https://i.imgur.com/AdM0ocW.png)  ![](https://i.imgur.com/MYA1zM4_d.webp?maxwidth=760&fidelity=grand)       ** !!! Please always get the most recent version of the mod! The mod is heavily in development and every update can bring important changes !!!**      [![](https://i.imgur.com/BtffJrZ.png)](https://discord.gg/QsVzSMUP4Y) click the image to join or use this link https://discord.gg/QsVzSMUP4Y ** Note:** this video shows a pretty old version of the mod; the mod has _**hugely**_ changed since the video was recorded (if you want to play the same version of the video, check  [Potassium & Sulphur's Gunpowder 1.11](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-gunpowder-crafting-sulfur/files/3565643)).    ![](https://i.imgur.com/PpUdQRU.png)   textures and stuffs (at the version: [psg 1.3.1a-1.16.5.jar](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-gunpowder-crafting/files/3722425))   ![](https://i.imgur.com/VFlUHYa_d.webp?maxwidth=1520&fidelity=grand)  textures and stuffs (at the version [PSG 3.3.3-1.18.X](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-gunpowder-crafting/files/3757180))    ![](https://i.imgur.com/qAuEea5.jpg)    these are the actual textures and stuffs (at the version: [PSG 3.3.5.18.X](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-gunpowder-crafting/files/3757180))   ![](https://i.imgur.com/tul5Mcu.png)  these are the actual textures and stuffs (at the last version: Psg **4.0.4-1.20.1**)                                                                                           featured here   A review by [Hauntd Shadw](https://youtube.com/@HauntdShadw-ho2fe?si=BQWjpcmoOfSlXRau) (PSG for 1.20.1       ![](https://i.imgur.com/Xyl4Fzr_d.webp?maxwidth=760&fidelity=grand)      _**ALSO TRY OUT**_[![](https://i.imgur.com/z7vIJsP.jpg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/traders-disguise-illusion) --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- This mod supports the following languages: English; 100% Italian (Italiano); 100% Japanese (日本語) German (Deutsche); French  (Français); _**Spanish & Portuguese will be next!**_    **( translations may arent perfect, feel free to report anything in the discored if something is wrong)**      This mod is more enjoyable if played along with: * [Create](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create); * [Charm Reforged](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/charm-reforged)  (unavailable for beside 1.16.5); * [Quark](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/quark) (unavailable with 1.17.X versions);     ![](https://i.imgur.com/gACWBgd.png)     The textures are still work in progress, so if you have any idea, we'll be happy to see any artwork in the server.   You are free to use this mod in a modpack unless explicitly Harry potter themed. the discord is open for any suggestion     To-Do List:   * ~~Fix Japanese localisation~~ * ~~Retexture the explosive bundle~~ * ~~real loot tables~~ * Adding Spanish adding Portuguese localizations   [ ](https://discord.gg/Nj7GuTs6)           **Q. Can I use this mod in a modpack or video?** A. Yes! Feel free to feature Potassium & sulfur's gunpowder  in your modpack or video. Just make sure to give credit. **Q. Can I repost this mod?** A. **No. You cannot repost this mod on any other site unless download is a redirect to this page (in this case you can repost it anywhere otherwise you can't  )**. **If you see this mod posted on other sites, please let me know. This Curseforge page is the only page this mod is allowed to be hosted on (except for MCreator ones), to post this mod in other sites it’s a violation of Author right)**   ![](https://i.imgur.com/0J6V8Ex_d.webp?maxwidth=640&shape=thumb&fidelity=medium) [**Stop mod reposting**](https://stopmodreposts.org/)   **Q. "Can I help to translate the mod?"** A. Yes  t'would be awesome. You can:  (even fixing actual translations would be great too)   💬 Translations I hope to make Potassium & sulphur’s gunpowder available for everyone, everywhere. This is done via community translations.   Want to help translate the mod into your language? Visit our discord channel by clicking the badge above to require the file to translate **Q.  "Is this mod discontinued?"** A. NO, it's not discontinued updates can take long but this mod is not discontinued    **Q. "where to write tips,issues,requests, questions... ?"** A. Preferably on discord, in the right channels, As **I'm very likely to not read comments here** While i'm very active on discord for work and personal purposes <3     [_Attack On Titan's Stuffs_](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/attack-on-titan-stuffs) (by [GiulyChan992♥](https://www.curseforge.com/members/giulychan992/projects)). [![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/thumbnails/423/361/310/172/attack-on-titans-1.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/attack-on-titan-stuffs)             [![](https://media.forgecdn.net/avatars/489/348/637795247357671202.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/bee-wax-stuffs-reborn)    [Wax's Stuffs Reborn](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/bee-wax-stuffs-reborn)           [Updated steel](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/steel-updated)
